parameters.jsCode:
// Generate birthday greeting based on milestone type const c = $input.first().json; const isTurning65 = c.isTurning65; const subject = isTurning65 ? `🎂 Your 65th Birthday is Coming Up - Important Medicare Information` : `🎂 Happy Upcoming Birthday, ${c.firstName || 'Friend'}!`; const html = isTurning65 ? `

🎂 Congratulations on Approaching Medicare Eligibility!

Dear ${c.firstName || 'Friend'},

Your 65th birthday is coming up in just ${c.daysUntil} days — congratulations!

This is a major milestone, and more importantly, it marks your eligibility for Medicare — the federal health insurance program that could save you thousands on healthcare.

What You Need to Know:

  • You're eligible for Medicare 3 months before your 65th birthday month
  • Your Initial Enrollment Period lasts 7 months (3 months before, the birthday month, and 3 months after)
  • Missing this window could mean higher premiums for life

Schedule a free consultation and let us help you navigate your Medicare options — at no cost to you.

📅 Book Your Free Medicare Review

📖 Download Your Free Medicare Guide

Warm regards,
The Buckalew Financial Team
Licensed in FL, TX, CA, NC, SC, MI | W248767

` : `

🎂 Happy Upcoming Birthday!

Dear ${c.firstName || 'Friend'},

We just wanted to wish you a wonderful upcoming birthday and thank you for being a valued client.

As always, if you have any insurance needs or questions, we're here to help.

📅 Schedule a Free Review

Warm regards,
The Buckalew Financial Team

`; return { ...c, subject, html, milestoneType: isTurning65 ? 'medicare' : 'general' };

parameters.title: Follow up with {{$json.firstName}} - Birthday/Milestone
parameters.notes: Milestone birthday outreach. {{$json.milestone}}. Schedule insurance review conversation.

parameters.name: text
